section.heading: Limitations

content.p: The limitations contained in section 2349aa–2(a) and (d) of this title shall apply to this part.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–195, pt. II, § 585, formerly § 584,as added Pub. L. 106–280, title III, § 301, Oct. 6, 2000, 114 Stat. 852; renumbered § 585, Pub. L. 107–228, div. B, title XIII, § 1303(1), Sept. 30, 2002, 116 Stat. 1436.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 585 of Pub. L. 87–195 was renumbered section 586 and is classified to section 2349bb–4 of this title.
